title: Papal peacemaker? Rubio visits Pope Leo after Trump's attacks
shortDescription: A potential political problem of President Trump’s own making hangs over Marco Rubio's visit with Pope Leo: Catholics are America's largest religious group.

title: Obama decries Trump weaponizing the DOJ
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama called out President Donald Trump for directing the Justice Department to prosecute his political opponents and critics.

shortDescription: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump honored the "quiet power" and "resolve" of military mothers ahead of Mother's Day.

title: Trump predicts Iran will 'end up agreeing' on US demands
shortDescription: Trump says Iran will ultimately accept U.S. demands on nuclear issues and Strait of Hormuz shipping.

title: Trump rejects US role as 'global police officer' to fight terrorism
shortDescription: Trump updated the country's counterterrorism policy to target ideological groups overseas and violent extremists at home.

shortDescription: Ex-President Barack Obama slammed President Donald Trump for ordering prosecutions, saying the attorney general isn't the president's "consigliere."

title: See logo for Palm Beach's newly renamed Trump International Airport
shortDescription: The new, all-gold logo, recommended by the Trump Organization, has as an eagle holding two olive branches.

title: Trump says bombing will resume if Iran rejects peace deal: live
